---
title: "DM_TEST_DSE4101"
author: "Kellianne Ng"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Library
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(sandwich)
library(urca)
```

# Stationary check 
```{r}
check_stationarity <- function(x, lags = NULL) {
  x <- as.numeric(x)
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]

  n <- length(x)

  if (n < 10) {
    return(list(
      n = n,
      test = "ADF",
      stat = NA_real_,
      crit5 = NA_real_,
      decision = "too few observations for reliable stationarity test"
    ))
  }

  if (is.null(lags)) {
    lags <- max(1L, floor(n^(1/3)))
  }

  out <- tryCatch({
    adf <- urca::ur.df(x, type = "drift", lags = lags)

    stat <- as.numeric(adf@teststat[1])
    crit5 <- as.numeric(adf@cval[1, "5pct"])

    list(
      n = n,
      test = "ADF",
      stat = stat,
      crit5 = crit5,
      decision = if (stat < crit5) {
        "stationary (reject unit root null)"
      } else {
        "non-stationary (fail to reject unit root null)"
      }
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    list(
      n = n,
      test = "ADF",
      stat = NA_real_,
      crit5 = NA_real_,
      decision = paste("test failed:", e$message)
    )
  })

  return(out)
}

```

# DM Test helper 
# benchmark = OLS 
# d_it = loss benchmark - loss candidate 
#      = OLS Squared error - candidate squared 
# positive mean(d) = candidate beats OLS
```{r}
run_dm_vs_benchmark <- function(df_bench,
                                df_cand,
                                benchmark_name = "OLS",
                                candidate_name = "Candidate",
                                hac_lag = NULL,
                                h = 1) {
  
  merged <- df_bench %>%
    transmute(
      caldt = as.Date(caldt),
      fundno = fundno,
      actual_alpha_bench = actual_alpha,
      pred_bench = predicted_alpha
    ) %>%
    inner_join(
      df_cand %>%
        transmute(
          caldt = as.Date(caldt),
          fundno = fundno,
          actual_alpha_cand = actual_alpha,
          pred_cand = predicted_alpha
        ),
      by = c("caldt", "fundno")
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      actual_alpha = actual_alpha_bench,
      bench_resid = actual_alpha_bench - pred_bench,
      cand_resid = actual_alpha_cand - pred_cand,
      d_obs = bench_resid^2 - cand_resid^2
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(caldt), is.finite(d_obs))
  
  d_ts <- merged %>%
    group_by(caldt) %>%
    summarise(
      d = mean(d_obs, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_funds = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(caldt)
  
  d <- d_ts$d
  T <- length(d)
  
  if (T < 5) {
    warning(paste("Very few time periods for DM test for", candidate_name, "- interpret results cautiously."))
  }
  
  if (is.null(hac_lag)) {
    hac_lag <- floor(T^(1/3))
  }
  
  stationarity_res <- check_stationarity(d)
  
  fit <- lm(d ~ 1)
  Vnw <- sandwich::NeweyWest(fit, lag = hac_lag, prewhite = FALSE, adjust = TRUE)
  se <- sqrt(Vnw[1, 1])
  
  dm_stat_raw <- as.numeric(coef(fit)[1] / se)
  
  # Harvey-Leybourne-Newbold correction
  hln_factor <- sqrt((T + 1 - 2 * h + (h * (h - 1)) / T) / T)
  dm_stat_hln <- hln_factor * dm_stat_raw
  
  # One-sided and two-sided p-values using t_{T-1}
  p_one_sided_candidate_better <- 1 - pt(dm_stat_hln, df = T - 1)
  p_one_sided_benchmark_better <- pt(dm_stat_hln, df = T - 1)
  p_two_sided <- 2 * min(p_one_sided_candidate_better, p_one_sided_benchmark_better)
  
  favour <- case_when(
    p_one_sided_candidate_better < 0.05 ~ candidate_name,
    p_one_sided_benchmark_better < 0.05 ~ benchmark_name,
    TRUE ~ "no significant difference"
  )
  
  list(
    summary = data.frame(
      benchmark = benchmark_name,
      candidate = candidate_name,
      T = T,
      h = h,
      hac_lag = hac_lag,
      mean_d = mean(d, na.rm = TRUE),
      DM_stat_HLN = dm_stat_hln,
      p_one_sided_candidate_better = p_one_sided_candidate_better,
      p_one_sided_benchmark_better = p_one_sided_benchmark_better,
      p_two_sided = p_two_sided,
      favour = favour,
      stationarity_decision = stationarity_res$decision
    ),
    d_ts = d_ts,
    merged = merged
  )
}

```

# Read all the files 
```{r}
file_map <- list(
  OLS = "../forecast_evaluation/df_for_dm_test_ols.csv",
  ENET = "../forecast_evaluation/df_for_dm_test_enet.csv",
  RF = "../forecast_evaluation/df_for_dm_test_rf.csv",
  BOOST = "../forecast_evaluation/df_for_dm_test_boost.csv",
  RNN = "../forecast_evaluation/df_for_dm_test_RNN.csv",
  FNN = "../forecast_evaluation/df_for_dm_test_fnn.csv",
  LASSO = "../forecast_evaluation/df_for_dm_test_Lasso.csv"
)

dfs <- lapply(file_map, read_csv)

```

# Run OLS vs every candidate model 
```{r}
benchmark_df <- dfs[["OLS"]]

candidate_names <- setdiff(names(dfs), "OLS")

dm_results <- lapply(candidate_names, function(model_name) {
  run_dm_vs_benchmark(
    df_bench = benchmark_df,
    df_cand = dfs[[model_name]],
    benchmark_name = "OLS",
    candidate_name = model_name,
    h = 1
  )
})

names(dm_results) <- candidate_names

```

# Collect summary table 
```{r}
dm_summary_table <- bind_rows(lapply(dm_results, function(x) x$summary)) %>%
  select(
    candidate,
    T,
    DM_stat_HLN,
    p_two_sided,
    favour,
    stationarity_decision
  ) %>%
  arrange(candidate)

print(dm_summary_table)

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)

plot_all_df <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(dm_results), function(model_name) {
    dm_results[[model_name]]$d_ts %>%
      mutate(candidate = model_name)
  })
)

ggplot(plot_all_df, aes(x = caldt, y = d)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ candidate, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Date-level loss differential against OLS benchmark",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Loss differential (OLS SE - candidate SE)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```
